===============
Documentation
===============

-----------------------
Standard Library Docs
-----------------------

* Rust’s standard library comes with deep, autogenerated documentation

  * Covers language basics (e.g., loops) and core/standard types (:rust:`u8`, :rust:`Option`, :rust:`BinaryHeap`)

* Access docs with :command:`rustup doc --std`

  * Or browse sites like https://std.rs or https://docs.rs

---------------------------
Documenting Your Own Code
---------------------------

* Rust comments are just **markdown** 

.. code:: rust

  /// Returns true if `lhs` is divisible by `rhs`,
  /// false if `rhs` is zero
  fn is_divisible_by(lhs: u32, rhs: u32) -> bool { … }

* :rust:`///` documents the following item

  * Rust treats the text as markdown
  * Things like lists and code work naturally

* :dfn:`inner doc comments`

  * :rust:`//!` (or :rust:`/*! */`)
  * Add documentation inside an item

.. code:: rust
  :number-lines: 1

  //! This module contains functionality relating to divisibility of integers.
